title: codereview pass 2: missing API documentation for -ENOSPC in header
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/app_identity/include/lichen/app_identity/app_identity.h does not document that lichen_app_identity_upsert_peer and upsert_peer_key return -ENOSPC when peer table (CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_IDENTITY_MAX_PEERS) is full. The remove_peer doc is present but upsert is not. Add precise return value documentation consistent with coap_keys.h style. P2 documentation. Tag: codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-pc5y
close_reason: Fixed all codereview findings including test update, header docs, comment sync, coap_keys consistency to -ENOSPC for table-full errors, handler update. 3 review passes completed with all P0-P4 addressed.
